title: ImportRow
description: Per-row outcome of an ImportBatch. Successful rows reference the inserted target record; failed rows hold the raw source data + failure_reason and become the dead-letter the operator can fix and retry.

status.description: succeeded = inserted or matched-via-dedupe; failed = validation/constraint reject; skipped = blank row or filtered out; retried = re-attempted after failure.

raw_data.description: Original source columns → values. Preserved so retry / download / debug work without the original file.

mapped_data.description: Source values after field_mapping applied. Null on rows that failed before mapping.

target_record_id.description: FK to the inserted/matched record (contact id, lead id, deal id, organization id). Null on failed rows.

dedupe_match.description: Existing record id if the dedupe strategy matched. Same as target_record_id when matched; null when a fresh insert.

failure_detail.description: Human-readable detail when failure_reason is set.
